intro: Apium graveolens, commonly known as celery seed tea, is a herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems. Drinking celery seed tea may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, menstrual cramps, and other conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.

recipe: To make apium graveolens tea for medicinal use, first, dry the seeds of the Apium graveolens plant, which is commonly known as celery seed, to preserve their potency.
